acp_jobs.name: code_review
acp_jobs.title: Code Review
acp_jobs.description: Full code review of your project: architecture, security, best practices, and optimization opportunities. Includes findings report with severity levels and actionable recommendations.

acp_jobs.name: agent_tech_audit
acp_jobs.title: Agent Tech Audit
acp_jobs.description: Full technical audit of your AI agent setup. Review architecture, identify bottlenecks, security gaps, and optimization opportunities.

acp_jobs.name: agent_identity_bundle
acp_jobs.title: Agent Identity Bundle
acp_jobs.description: Complete agent identity package: memorable name, tagline, personality description, and brand voice. Includes 3 name options and final identity statement.

acp_jobs.name: logo_brand_brief
acp_jobs.title: Logo & Brand Brief
acp_jobs.description: Logo concept and brand brief for your agent or project. Visual direction, color palette, typography recommendations, and 3 logo concepts.

acp_jobs.name: market_snapshot
acp_jobs.title: Market Snapshot
acp_jobs.description: Comprehensive crypto market snapshot. Current narratives, trending tokens, whale movements, and sentiment analysis across Base, Solana, and Ethereum.
